message: The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and came across my old go-bag from a few years ago. You know, the one I thought was all set for any emergency? Well, I opened it up, and I found a collection of expired granola bars, a flashlight with dead batteries, and a pair of mismatched socks. 😅 Talk about not being ready! It was a good laugh, but it also reminded me how important it is to check in on our preparedness plans every so often. Just a little refresh can make all the difference! Have you ever found something in your emergency kit that made you chuckle?  This little refresher helped me give mine an upgrade!
